# Realsee Skills

Purpose: Source-available Realsee agent skill capability distribution for users and agent runtimes.
Agent priority: inspect this file first, then README.md, README.zh-CN.md, docs/usage.md, and AGENTS.md.
Language: English is the default documentation path. Simplified Chinese documentation is available in README.zh-CN.md, docs/zh-CN/, same-directory *.zh-CN.md policy docs, and .agents/skills/argus/README.zh-CN.md.

Primary skill:
- Name: argus
- State: stable
- Shape: a SKILL.md instructing the agent + exactly one script (the gateway pipeline)
- Definition: .agents/skills/argus/SKILL.md
- English documentation: .agents/skills/argus/README.md
- Simplified Chinese documentation: .agents/skills/argus/README.zh-CN.md
- Public OpenAPI contract: .agents/skills/argus/references/argus-gateway-openapi.json
- CLI entrypoint: .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs (the only script; everything else is agent + Bash, per SKILL.md)

User and runtime map:
- Agent rules: AGENTS.md and AGENTS.zh-CN.md
- Architecture: ARCHITECTURE.md and ARCHITECTURE.zh-CN.md
- Support: SUPPORT.md and SUPPORT.zh-CN.md
- Install guide overview: docs/install-guides.md and docs/zh-CN/install-guides.md
- Claude Code plugin install: docs/claude-plugin.md and docs/zh-CN/claude-plugin.md
- Codex install: docs/codex.md and docs/zh-CN/codex.md
- Usage guide: docs/usage.md and docs/zh-CN/usage.md
- User README: README.md and README.zh-CN.md
- Maintainer docs: docs/development.md and docs/zh-CN/development.md
- Release docs: docs/release.md and docs/zh-CN/release.md
- Public distribution checklist: docs/public-distribution.md and docs/zh-CN/public-distribution.md
- Community guide: docs/community.md and docs/zh-CN/community.md
- Generated Claude plugin package: plugins/realsee-skills/
- Marketplace manifest: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
- Validation scripts: scripts/
- Release metadata: release-channel.json

Common commands:
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent claude-code
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent codex
- npx skills add realsee-developer/skills --skill argus --agent '*'
- npx skills add . --skill argus
- npm run install:codex-skills
- npm run setup:local
- npm run doctor
- npm run smoke
- node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs --image /absolute/path/input.jpg --workspace ./workspace --yes --json
- node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs --image /absolute/path/input.jpg --workspace ./workspace --yes --json --async
- node .agents/skills/argus/scripts/run-argus.mjs --resume --workspace ./workspace/<run-dir> --json
- npm run validate:ai
- npm run validate:docs
- npm run validate:skills
- npm run rebuild
- npm run test:skill
- npm run ci

Credential resolution (the agent orchestrates this per SKILL.md, no helper scripts):
- Try shell env first: `printenv REALSEE_APP_KEY REALSEE_APP_SECRET REALSEE_REGION`.
- Try file: `[ -f ~/.realsee/credentials ] && set -a && . ~/.realsee/credentials && set +a` (the file is shell-sourceable env).
- Otherwise collect from user via one-question-per-turn Q&A (see SKILL.md "Step 1a").
- Save (with explicit user consent) via a Bash heredoc: `cat > ~/.realsee/credentials <<EOF ... EOF && chmod 600 ~/.realsee/credentials`.

Status, opening, dimension check — also agent-driven via Bash:
- Status poll: `cat <workspace_dir>/result.json` every 5–10s.
- Open GLB/preview: `open` (macOS) / `xdg-open` (Linux) / `start ""` (Windows).
- JPEG aspect ratio precheck: `sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight` (macOS) / `identify -format '%w %h'` (ImageMagick) / pure-node fallback. Enforces 2:1 (panorama) or 1:1 (pinhole) before upload.

Safety:
- Plugin does not declare userConfig — credentials are resolved at runtime by the skill, not at install time.
- Credentials persistence is opt-in: the agent asks the user before writing ~/.realsee/credentials.
- Argus usage is a remote upload of the selected local image.
- Require user consent before every upload.
- Do not commit secrets, generated credentials, account identifiers, private URLs, GLB files, .env files, or temporary workspaces.
- Edit source skill files under .agents/skills/ and run npm run rebuild.
- Keep generated Claude plugin files synchronized with source skill files.

Do not add:
- Internal evidence files
- Live scorecards
- Private source references
- Internal process docs
- Local absolute paths
